purpose: Local-first creative editor and Hunter-callable creative engine for image, design, GIF, and future video/intro generation tasks.

human_app.description: Normal user opens the desktop app and edits manually.

hunter_engine.description: Hunter calls reusable engine/CLI jobs without opening the human UI.
hunter_engine.note: Create CLI/job runner before Hunter depends on this mode.

online_ui.description: Cloud/website UI for uploads, templates, job queue, and results.
online_ui.note: Do not treat this repo as a Cloudflare Worker yet; no wrangler/package web app config exists currently.

hunter_rules.when_user_asks_for_image_or_video_work: Hunter may suggest TTG Creative Studio as the THETECHGUY creative tool. Hunter may only execute work through it after a local CLI/job runner exists and is registered.
hunter_rules.cloudflare_rule: Do not deploy heavy image/video processing inside a Cloudflare Worker. Use Cloudflare for auth, job queue, uploads/downloads, status, and routing; run processing locally or on a proper server/GPU.
hunter_rules.local_execution_rule: Heavy processing runs through ATHENA/local executor now, later GT502/server/GPU. Outputs should be stored through Hunter-approved storage and linked back to the case/chat/job.
hunter_rules.public_wording: Public users see TTG Creative Studio as a creative/design tool. They should not see internal engine, Hunter routing, or local executor details.

job_json.description: Hunter creates a job JSON file with input assets, task type, options, output path, and callback/status target. Creative Studio engine processes it and returns a result manifest.

desktop_app.description: PyQt desktop application built with PyInstaller and installer scripts.
